summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TA Engine cryptocurrency analytical tool. All reported issues from iteration_6 have been resolved. Structure tab navigation now works perfectly, showing TA Explorer with all required functionality.
passed_tests: ✅ API /api/ta-engine/pattern-v2/BTC works and returns patterns (Rectangle pattern, Confidence: 0.42)
✅ Structure tab navigation FIXED - clicking Structure shows TA Explorer, NOT Prediction page
✅ TA Explorer shows 3 required tabs: Patterns (0), Analysis (10), No Trade - all functional
✅ Pattern Lifecycle buttons are clickable and filter patterns correctly (FORMING, DEVELOPING, CONFIRMED, INVALIDATED)
✅ All main tabs work correctly: Research, Structure, Signals, Execution, Deep
✅ Timeframe switching works perfectly - all 6 timeframes functional (4H, 1D, 7D, 1M, 6M, 1Y)
✅ Chart rendering functional with candlestick data and technical analysis overlays
✅ Pattern cards display correctly with confidence scores (Double Bottom 78%, Loose Wedge 46%, Loose Range 30%)
✅ Analysis layers show 10 different technical analysis components
✅ Trade setup functionality accessible through TA Explorer
✅ URL navigation stays on /tech-analysis for all tab switches (no unwanted redirects)
